title: KitchenPerfected 2 Slice Wide Slot Toaster - Brushed Steel - E2019BS
features: WIDE TOASTING SLOTS: Narrow toasting slots can cause your food to be squashed or even scorched as it presses against the element; avoid this with the KitchenPerfected 2 Large Slice Wide Slot Toaster - the Ideal choice for thickly sliced bread.
7 BROWNING CONTROL SETTINGS: Toast your bread to perfection with this easy to use dial. You can choose from levels 1 to 7 for your desired result!

SLIDE OUT CRUMB TRAY: Keep your appliance clean and crumb free without making a mess on your counter top! Simply slide the tray out and discard of the crumbs with zero hassle. Not only will this help to clean the appliance but it also reduces the risk of fire.

DEFROST: Use the defrost button to add extra time to the toasting process; simply press the button straight after pushing down the carriage lever. This clever function will work out how much extra time your bread needs to fully defrost and then toast to your desired level as chosen on the browning control dial.
REHEAT: The reheat button will gently reheat your already toasted food. If the toast is ready but your other items on the menu are not, do not worry; simply reheat the toast when the time is right!
description: Equipped with seven browning control settings for toast just the way you like it! The dial which is easy to use can be adjusted from levels 1 to 7 according to your preference. Designed with the user in mind, this cool touch toaster offers a wide range of useful functions such as defrost, reheat and a mid-cycle cancel button. Firstly, the wide slots allows you to toast extra thick sliced bread. Secondly, the defrost button will let the toaster know to add extra time to the toasting process meaning the bread will defrost first and then toast to your specification later. Thirdly, the reheat button which is best used when you're cooking other items - if they aren't quite ready simply pop your toast back down for a quick warm up when the time is right! Finally, the cancel button; this handy function will turn off the element and pop your toast up immediately which can come in handy when you need to dash or think you may be burning it! To keep your toaster in good working order and to produce the optimum results you should clean the appliance frequently; the design includes a slide-out crumb tray which can be easily removed allowing you to discard crumbs with zero hassle. Box Includes : KitchenPerfected 2 Slice Toaster Instruction Manual
